description_long: This is a wide, contemporary sofa upholstered in a dark, matte fabric with a subtle, slightly textured finish. The seat features a single, large bench cushion, while the backrest is adorned with five loose, generously filled cushions of varying sizes, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are broad, straight, and slightly flared, rising to nearly the same height as the backrest for a cocooning effect. The sofa's base is solid and fully upholstered, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and monolithic look. The overall silhouette is boxy yet softened by the overstuffed cushions, making it suitable for both modern and casual urban environments. The color is a deep charcoal brown, and the surface appears soft to the touch, ideal for comfort and relaxation.
description: A wide, modern sofa in dark matte fabric with broad armrests and five loose, plush back cushions. The design is boxy yet inviting, with a single large seat cushion and no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, single seat cushion, and five loose back cushions arranged across the backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, fully upholstered back and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion depth, with a clear view of the sofa's solid base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose back cushions of varying sizes arranged in a row, with a single large bench seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in color and appear overstuffed.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight, and slightly flared armrests, fully upholstered and rising nearly to the height of the backrest, with a thick, padded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is fully upholstered and extends to the floor, giving the appearance of a solid, grounded structure.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with five loose, overstuffed cushions providing additional height and comfort; no tufting or channeling visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown fabric with a subtle, slightly textured matte finish; no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
